Package org.eventb.internal.core.parser

Class SubParsers

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.parser.SubParsers
public class SubParsers extends Object
Sub-parsers are specialized parsers; they are usually bound to an operator.

Type parameters of sub parsers are conventionally named R and C. R is the result type of the (sub)parsing, i.e the type of the parsed object. C is the type of the children of the parsed object.

      public static final ILedParser<Expression> OFTYPE_PARSER
      Parses expressions outside bound identifier declarations. Always returns an expression with the same tag as left.
